agb.title: Terms of Service
agb.updated: Last updated: June 2026 · applies to the Komma app
agb.intro: Welcome to Komma. These Terms govern your use of the Komma app and related services provided by Gotham Consulting GmbH, Rosenweg 4, 99820 Hörselberg-Hainich, Germany ("we", "us", or "Provider"). By creating an account or using Komma, you agree to these Terms. German law applies; the German version of these Terms is legally binding.

sections.title: 1. The services we provide
body: Our mission is to give people the power to get active in real life, inspire each other, and complete challenges together. To support this mission we provide you with the following services ("Services"):
list: A personalised experience: we suggest challenges, crews, and content that match your interests and activity.
Connections with people and crews that matter to you, including direct messages, crew chats, and shared activities.
Tools for self-expression and communication: proofs, posts, reactions, profiles, badges, and AI-assisted features.
Safe, trustworthy, and reliable services: we fight abuse, protect accounts, and remove content that violates these Terms or our Community Standards.
Research and innovation: we use aggregated and anonymised data to continually improve our Services.

sections.title: 2. How our services are funded
body: Using Komma is free of charge. We reserve the right to introduce paid features, subscriptions, or advertising in the future. Any such offers will be clearly labelled and disclosed before purchase. We do not sell your personal data.

sections.title: 3. Your commitments to Komma and our community
body: To keep our community a safe place, you agree to the following commitments when you create an account and use our Services.

sections.title: 3.1 Who can use Komma
body: You must be at least 14 years old. If the legal minimum age in your country is higher, that age applies. People under 18 need parental consent.
You must use the same name you use in everyday life. Each person may only have one personal account. You may not share your account with third parties without our consent.
We may deny access if your account was previously removed for violations, if you are a convicted sex offender, or if suspension is necessary to protect our community.

sections.title: 3.2 What you can share and do
body: We want people to express themselves freely on Komma — within the limits of the law and respecting others' rights. You may not use the Services to:
list: Share or do anything that is unlawful, misleading, discriminatory, or fraudulent.
Infringe the rights of others, including copyright, trademarks, or personality rights.
Engage in hate speech, incitement to violence, threats, harassment, or bullying.
Share sexual content involving minors or content that is pornographic or harmful to minors.
Distribute spam, fraudulent schemes, malware, or attempt to manipulate, scrape, or circumvent our systems.
Impair the security, integrity, or availability of the Services.

sections.title: 3.3 The permissions you give us
body: To provide the Services we need certain permissions from you:
list: Permission to use content you create: you retain ownership of your content and grant us a non-exclusive, transferable, sub-licensable, royalty-free, worldwide licence to host, use, distribute, modify, run, copy, publicly perform, display, translate, and create derivative works of your content in connection with operating and promoting the Services. This licence ends when you delete your content or account, except where your content has been shared with others who have not deleted it.
Permission to use your name, profile picture, and information about your actions in connection with commercial, sponsored, or related content — without any compensation to you.
Permission to update software you have downloaded to provide new versions, security updates, and feature improvements.

sections.title: 4. Additional provisions
body: The following provisions apply in addition to your commitments and our Services.

sections.title: 4.1 Updating these Terms
body: We continuously evolve our Services and may amend these Terms — for example to reflect new features or comply with legal requirements. We will notify you of changes in the app at least 30 days in advance. If you do not object within four weeks of being notified, the amended Terms are deemed accepted. If you object, you may continue using the Services until the next termination date.

sections.title: 4.2 Account suspension or termination
body: You may delete your account or terminate the Services at any time. We may suspend or terminate your account or individual features if you repeatedly or seriously violate these Terms or our Community Standards, if we are legally required to do so, or if your conduct creates risk or legal exposure for us, other users, or third parties. We will inform you, where possible and permitted, and state the reason.

sections.title: 4.3 Limitation of our liability
body: We are liable without limitation for damages resulting from injury to life, body, or health, for intent and gross negligence, under the German Product Liability Act, and within the scope of any warranties given. For slight negligence we are only liable for breach of material contractual obligations (cardinal duties) and limited to the foreseeable damages typical for this type of contract. Any further liability is excluded.
We do not warrant that the Services will always be error-free, secure, or available. You use them at your own risk and within the limits of applicable law.

sections.title: 4.4 Disputes, governing law, and venue
body: These Terms and any claims between you and us are governed by German law, excluding the UN Convention on Contracts for the International Sale of Goods. Mandatory consumer-protection rules of your country of residence remain unaffected.
For merchants, legal entities under public law, and special funds under public law, the venue is the seat of the Provider. Consumers may sue at their statutory venue.

The European Commission provides a platform for online dispute resolution: https://ec.europa.eu/consumers/odr/. We are neither obliged nor willing to participate in dispute resolution proceedings before a consumer arbitration board.

sections.title: 4.5 Direct messages and encryption
body: Direct messages and crew chats are stored encrypted on our servers (encryption at rest). There is no end-to-end encryption. We may decrypt and access messages in justified individual cases to comply with legal obligations or to enforce these Terms.

sections.title: 4.6 AI-generated content
body: Parts of our Services — such as challenge suggestions, translations, cover images, badges, or coaching hints — are created in whole or in part by artificial intelligence. Such content may be inaccurate, incomplete, or inappropriate and does not replace professional, medical, or legal advice.

sections.title: 4.7 Miscellaneous
body: If any provision of these Terms is invalid or unenforceable, the remaining provisions remain in effect. We may transfer our rights and obligations under these Terms to a third party in connection with a merger, acquisition, or sale of our business; you may only transfer your rights and obligations with our written consent.
Our failure to enforce any provision is not a waiver of our right to enforce it later.

sections.title: 5. Contact
body: Gotham Consulting GmbH, Rosenweg 4, 99820 Hörselberg-Hainich, Germany. Email: hallo@komma.app

agb.authoritative: The German version of these Terms is the legally binding version. This translation is provided for convenience only.
agb.contact: For questions about these Terms, please contact us using the details listed in the {{imprint}}.
